name: Retail Inventory Predictor
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for demand intelligence — weather impact narrative generation, social trend interpretation, economic indicator analysis, promotional impact reasoning, supply chain disruption assessment

prod.note: ~1M tokens/day, gpt-4o for complex demand analysis

services.name: Azure Machine Learning
services.purpose: Demand forecasting models — time-series prediction, weather-demand correlation, promotional lift estimation, seasonal decomposition, stockout probability scoring, safety stock optimization

prod.note: Managed endpoints, 4 vCPU, daily forecast refresh

enterprise.note: GPU compute, deep learning demand models, store-level granularity

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Inventory snapshots, demand forecasts, replenishment orders, weather correlation data, social trend signals, store-SKU performance history, supplier lead times

prod.note: Dedicated throughput, change feed for replenishment triggers

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store for demand pattern analysis

services.name: Azure Event Hubs
services.purpose: Real-time signal ingestion — POS transaction streams, inventory level updates, weather data feeds, social media trend triggers, supplier status notifications, promotional event signals

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Demand signal processing — weather API polling, social trend scraping, economic indicator ingestion, forecast-to-replenishment order conversion, supplier notification dispatch

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Inventory prediction API — demand forecast engine, replenishment optimizer, safety stock calculator, what-if scenario engine, dashboard backend

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Weather API keys, social media API credentials, supplier system integration keys, ERP connection strings, inventory data encryption keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Forecast accuracy (MAPE/WMAPE), signal freshness, replenishment order timing, stockout prediction success rate, API latency, pipeline health

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine daily demand summaries and basic weather impact assessments — reserve GPT-4o for complex multi-signal demand interpretation and supply chain disruption analysis, saving 65% on AI costs
Cache weather forecast data with 3-hour TTL — weather forecasts update infrequently; avoid redundant API calls by caching responses from weather services at the region-granularity level
Implement tiered ML model inference — use lightweight statistical models (ARIMA/ETS) for stable-demand products and reserve GPU-powered deep learning models for products with high demand volatility
Use Event Hubs capture to Blob Storage for raw signal archival instead of extended Event Hubs retention — 90% cheaper for historical data that feeds model retraining pipelines
Schedule non-critical forecast refreshes (monthly trend reports, seasonal planning) during off-peak hours using Functions consumption plan — only store-level daily forecasts need real-time compute
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
